# AszureX

> AszureX delivers custom software development, ERP implementation, CRM solutions, API integration, and managed technical support for growing businesses worldwide.

AszureX is a software development and technical support company that helps growing businesses build reliable operational infrastructure. Founded by Vishwas G V, the company operates on a people-first philosophy with a goal of employing 1,000 people within 10 years.

## Core Services

AszureX provides 14 specialisms across three core areas:

### Custom Software Development
- Full-stack web application development
- Internal business tools and dashboards
- Workflow automation systems
- Scalable SaaS platform architecture
- Admin panels and reporting interfaces

### ERP & CRM Implementation
- ERPNext implementation and configuration
- Odoo setup and customization
- HubSpot CRM setup and onboarding
- Zoho CRM configuration
- Sales pipeline design and automation
- Inventory and supply chain management

### Managed Technical Support
- Technical Support L1 and L2
- Cloud and infrastructure support
- Application support and incident response
- Customer success support
- Documentation and knowledge base
- Data and reporting support

## How AszureX Works

AszureX follows a four-phase delivery model on every engagement:
1. **Discovery** — requirements mapping before any work begins
2. **Design** — system architecture and workflows designed for scale
3. **Build** — modern technologies with transparent milestones
4. **Support** — post-launch maintenance and ongoing improvement

## Key Facts

- 30-minute consultation available
- 24-hour maximum response time guaranteed on all inquiries
- No long-term contracts — flexible month-to-month engagement models
- Serves businesses worldwide
- Remote-first team
